title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Amour
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Amour assembly segment.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Amour
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Amour assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
